shots.prompt: A cinematic sunrise over the Himalayas.
shots.provider_flow: PixVerse (highest resolution video generation for critical beats)
shots.cinematic_prompt: Framing: 85mm portrait lens, shallow depth of field. Camera Movement: slow cinematic push-in tracking shot. Lighting: diffused soft light, low contrast beauty lighting. Composition: center. Key Motion: breathing and micro eyes movement. Emotional Resonance: hope.
shots.negative_prompt: ugly, deformed, blurry, low resolution, watermark

shots.prompt: Animate the sunrise with moving clouds and gentle camera push-in.
shots.cinematic_prompt: Framing: 35mm anamorphic wide lens, deep focus. Camera Movement: static tripod lock-down shot, absolutely stable framing. Lighting: diffused soft light, low contrast beauty lighting. Composition: rule of thirds. Key Motion: cloth and hair floating simulation. Emotional Resonance: hope.
shots.negative_prompt: ugly, deformed, blurry, low resolution, watermark
